title: Travelers Bound for the U.K. Hit a Roadblock: Electronic Authorization System Is Down
summary_full: Some visitors from the U.S., Canada and most European countries can’t get an electronic travel authorization and are being turned away from planes, trains and boats.
summary_public: Some visitors from the U.S., Canada and most European countries can’t get an electronic travel authorization and are being turned away from planes, trains and boats.
